items.title: Quantum Information Theory
items.description: I am interested in entanglement, distinguishability, quantum channels, and the mathematical structure behind information processing in quantum systems.

items.title: Quantum Foundations
items.description: I like thinking about the conceptual structure of measurement, postselection, weak measurements, and how quantum theory differs from classical intuition.

items.title: Resource Theory
items.description: Resource-theoretic ideas are appealing because they connect abstract structure with operational meaning. This is one of my current long-term interests.

items.title: Quantum Measurement
items.description: Measurement models, pointer states, and the information carried by measurement outcomes are central to how I think about quantum systems.
